title: Terms of Use & Privacy Policy
appDescription: is an iOS application designed to help players track scores for board games. Track scores for up to 8 players, view score history, and create custom games with your own scoring rules.
agreeToTerms: By using the app, you agree to the terms and practices described below.

overview.para1: {appName} is an iOS application designed to help players track scores for board games. Track scores for up to 8 players, view score history, and create custom games with your own scoring rules.
overview.para2: By using the app, you agree to the terms and practices described below.

intendedUse.title: 2.1 Intended Use
intendedUse.para1: {appName} is a score tracking tool designed for casual and competitive board game play. It helps keep track of scores during game sessions.
intendedUse.para2: This app is intended for entertainment purposes only.

accuracyOfInformation.title: 2.2 Accuracy of Information
list: Entering correct player names
Accurately tracking scores during games
Keeping the app updated to ensure proper functionality
accuracyOfInformation.para2: The app provides tools to track scores, but the accuracy of game results depends on correct usage.

noLiability.title: 2.3 No Liability
noLiability.para1: {appName} is provided "as is" without any warranties. The developer is not liable for:
list: Disputes arising from score discrepancies
Game results being used for gambling or professional competitions
Any loss of data due to app deletion
Device or software issues

userResponsibility.title: 2.4 User Responsibility
list: Using the app fairly and accurately
Backing up important game data if needed
Understanding the scoring rules of each game you play

whatDataWeCollect.title: 3.1 What Data We Collect
whatDataWeCollect.para1: {appName} collects only the minimum data necessary to function. No accounts, passwords, or social logins are required.

storedOnDevice.title: Stored on Device (Local Storage)
list: Player names
Game names and custom game configurations
Score history for each game
App preferences (language, theme)

syncedToIcloud.title: Synced to iCloud
syncedToIcloud.para1: To allow data recovery when reinstalling the app or switching devices, the following data is automatically synced to your personal iCloud account using iCloud Key-Value Storage:
list: Player names
Game configurations
Score history
App preferences

whatDataWeCollect.important: **Important:** iCloud data is tied to your Apple ID. Only you can access this data across your devices. We do not have access to your iCloud data.

howDataIsUsed.title: 3.2 How Data Is Used
list: Tracking game scores
Saving game history
Syncing data to your personal iCloud account for backup
Personalizing app preferences
doNotList: Sell your data to third parties
Share your data except as described in this policy
Access other apps or data on your device

pushNotifications.title: 3.3 Push Notifications
pushNotifications.para1: The app may send push notifications for game reminders if enabled. These require your permission and can be managed in your device settings.

localStorage.title: Local Storage
list: Data is stored securely on your device using iOS UserDefaults
Protected by your device's built-in security
Automatically deleted when you uninstall the app

cloudStorage.title: iCloud Storage
list: Data is stored in your personal iCloud account
Transmitted via encrypted connections
Protected by your Apple ID password
Persists even after deleting the app

dataRetention.title: 3.5 Data Retention
dataRetention.para1: Your data is stored locally on your device and optionally synced to iCloud.

onYourDevice.title: On Your Device
list: Data remains until you uninstall the app
Uninstalling the app permanently deletes all local data

inIcloud.title: In iCloud
list: Data persists even after deleting the app
This allows data recovery if you reinstall the app

toPermanentlyDelete.title: To permanently delete all data:
steps: Uninstall the app from your device
If iCloud sync was enabled, data will remain in iCloud until manually deleted via iCloud settings

yourRightsAndControl.title: 3.6 Your Rights and Control
list: View your stored game data
Edit player names and scores
Delete individual games or all game history
Modify app preferences
Reset all data from the app

thirdPartyServices.title: 3.7 Third-Party Services

icloud.title: iCloud (Apple)
list: Purpose: Cloud data storage and sync for backup
Data shared: App data syncs to your personal iCloud account
Privacy policy: https://www.apple.com/legal/privacy/

thirdPartyServices.para2: These services are bound by their own privacy policies.

dataSharingAndDisclosure.title: 3.8 Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharingAndDisclosure.para1: We do not sell or rent your data to third parties.
dataSharingAndDisclosure.para2: We may only disclose your information:
list: When required by legal process
To protect rights, property, or safety

childrensPrivacy.para1: {appName} is not intended for users under 13 years old. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
childrensPrivacy.para2: If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately so we can delete it.

internationalUsers.para1: Your iCloud data is stored in Apple data centers, which may be located in different countries depending on your region and Apple ID settings.
internationalUsers.para2: By using the app, you consent to the processing of data as described in this policy.

changesToPolicy.para1: We may update these Terms of Use and Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be indicated by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.
changesToPolicy.para2: Your continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

yourConsent.para1: By downloading, installing, and using {appName}, you consent to:
list: The collection and use of data as described in this policy
Storing data in your personal iCloud account (if enabled)
The terms described in this document

contact.para1: If you have questions, concerns, or requests regarding these terms or privacy practices, please contact:
contact.para2: We will respond to inquiries within 30 days.

gdpr.para1: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), our legal basis for collecting and using your data is:
list: Consent: You provide explicit consent by using the app
Legitimate interest: Operating the core functionality of the app
gdpr.para3: To exercise these rights, contact us at avdev2024@gmail.com.

ccpa.para1: If you are a California resident, you have the right to:
list: Know what personal information we collect
Request deletion of your personal information
Opt-out of the sale of personal information
Exercise your privacy rights without discrimination
ccpa.para3: To exercise these rights, contact us at avdev2024@gmail.com.

finalNote: By using {appName}, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
